title: 英國內政大臣彭黛玲支持BNO平權

replies.msg:
https://publications.parliament.uk/pa/cm201920/cmselect/cmfaff/109/109.pdf

The issue of British National Overseas passport holders has also come to our attention in the course of this inquiry. As individuals holding the BN(O) passports do not have British citizenship, they do not benefit from the same rights accorded to UK citizens. In the context of the well-documented arrests of pro-democracy demonstrators, book sellers and political activists, we are concerned that BN(O) passport holders, by reason of not having the right of abode in the UK, may become more vulnerable to arrests by authorities.



We further recommend that the Government extends the right of abode to Hong Kong residents who are British National (Overseas) passport holders as a means of reassurance that the UK cares about its nationals.

2. 出世時父或母要持有澳門身份証。
3. 要通過語言考試。
